# gopwnit

> gopwnit is a cybersecurity skills platform where individuals learn offensive security through hands-on labs and CTF competitions, and organizations host their own CTF events — built and hosted in India. gopwnit is operated by GOPWNIT, a partnership firm founded 30 January 2026.

## Core pages

- [About](https://gopwnit.com/about): Company facts, founders, and mission.
- [Platform](https://gopwnit.com/platform): Full feature set — labs, CTF challenge categories, learning path, ranking system, hosting tools.
- [Host a CTF](https://gopwnit.com/host-a-ctf): How organizations host their own CTF competitions on gopwnit.
- [Events](https://gopwnit.com/events): Past and upcoming CTF competitions run on gopwnit.
- [FAQ](https://gopwnit.com/faq): Direct answers to common questions about the platform, pricing, data handling, and hosting.
- [Security](https://gopwnit.com/security): How gopwnit secures accounts, sessions, and data.
- [Blog](https://gopwnit.com/blog): CTF write-ups, learning guides, and hosting guides.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://gopwnit.com/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://gopwnit.com/terms)
- [Code of Conduct](https://gopwnit.com/code-of-conduct)
- [Cookie Policy](https://gopwnit.com/cookies)
